components.name: Primary Requirement Registry
components.role: stable requirement identity and verification classes

components.name: Architecture Layer and Ingress Registry
components.role: L0-L6 and GIIS canonical responsibility model

components.name: L2 Control-Plane Registry
components.role: L2-A, L2-O, L2-E responsibilities and handoffs

components.name: Classification Registry
components.role: Core, Extension, Profile, Runtime, Public and Private classifications

components.name: Verification and Recovery Boundary Registry
components.role: verification, sealing, restore, cutover, release and deployment boundaries

components.name: Public and Private Sovereign Boundary Registry
components.role: public claim, disclosure, redaction and private-L0 boundaries

components.name: Traceability Registry
components.role: RFC-to-evidence trace model and failure states

components.name: Change and Claim Effects Registry
components.role: change classes, migration, revalidation and claim effects

components.name: Review and Lifecycle Registry
components.role: review, candidate, verification and disposition state machines

supporting_artifacts.name: Component Manifest
supporting_artifacts.role: complete package index and materialization gate

package_completeness_rules: all required JSON artifacts must parse
C7 must contain exactly 50 governance verbs
C4 must contain L0-L6 and one non-numbered GIIS surface
C5 must contain L2-A, L2-O and L2-E
all components must map to stable requirement IDs
no component may claim adopted, accepted, sealed, released or deployed state by existence
component manifest completion establishes materialized only, not validated, canonicalized, digest-bound or adopted
next_phase_preconditions: no governance disposition inferred from materialization
